name: Corn-Meal Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and mix with sugar, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. Add corn-meal to the dry ingredients and combine with egg, shortening, and milk until smooth.
3. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board and pat into a rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Cut the dough as desired for cookie-sized pieces.
5. Brush the tops of the turnovers with melted butter and fold each one in half.
6. Place the turnovers on a well-oiled baking sheet.
7. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 10 minutes.
8 servings
